subject: FW: Starfish Spreads the Word
body:
From: Heather Mann [mailto:hmann204@hotmail.com] 
Sent: Thursday, October 25, 2007 9:37 AM
To: hmann204@hotmail.com
Subject: Starfish Spreads the Word

 

Dear Friends, 

 

As some of you know, I am involved in the Starfish Greathearts
Foundation which supports children in South Africa whose parents, due to
the Aids epidemic, are no longer able to take care of them.

 

We are having our yearly fundraising dinner this Saturday and have just
received the most wonderful auction lot - 

 

  The Formula 1 Racing Suit worn by Kimi Raikkonen of Ferrarri in the
Canadian Grand Prix in June 2007!

 

We are hoping to have a hugely successful auction of this lot and I
would ask you to forward this e-mail on to anyone who is a Formula 1 fan
and who you think might just view this as the ultimate prize.

 

Your help is truly appreciated - Heather
body_html:
From: Heather Mann [mailto:hmann204@hotmail.com]
Sent: Thursday, October 25, 2007 9:37 AM
To: hmann204@hotmail.com
Subject: Starfish Spreads the Word

 

Dear Friends,

 

As some of you know, I am involved in the Starfish Greathearts Foundation which supports children in South Africa whose parents, due to the Aids epidemic, are no longer able to take care of them.

 

We are having our yearly fundraising dinner this Saturday and have just received the most wonderful auction lot -

 

  The Formula 1 Racing Suit worn by Kimi Raikkonen of Ferrarri in the Canadian Grand Prix in June 2007!

 

We are hoping to have a hugely successful auction of this lot and I would ask you to forward this e-mail on to anyone who is a Formula 1 fan and who you think might just view this as the ultimate prize.

 

Your help is truly appreciated - Heather
